name: SRTL_POINTS
description: SmartRTL maximum number of points on path

name: VISO_POS_X
description: Visual odometry camera X position offset

name: VISO_POS_Y
description: Visual odometry camera Y position offset

name: VISO_POS_Z
description: Visual odometry camera Z position offset

name: VTX_ENABLE
description: Is the Video Transmitter enabled or not

name: WINCH_RATE_MAX
description: Winch deploy or retract rate maximum

name: WINCH_POS_P
description: Winch control position error P gain

name: WPNAV_RFND_USE
description: Waypoint missions use rangefinder for terrain following

name: ASPD_FALLBACK
valid_values: Fallback only to other airspeed sensors
Fallback to thrust based airspeed estimation

name: ASPD_SCALE_APPLY
valid_values: Do not automatically apply the estimated scale
Apply the estimated scale after disarm
Apply the estimated scale in air

name: FW_AT_APPLY
valid_values: Do not apply the new gains (logging only)
Apply the new gains after disarm
Apply the new gains in air

name: MC_AT_APPLY
valid_values: Do not apply the new gains (logging only)
Apply the new gains after disarm
WARNING Apply the new gains in air

name: COM_LOW_BAT_ACT
valid_values: Return at critical level, land at emergency level

name: FW_LND_USETER
valid_values: Use the terrain estimate to trigger the flare (only)
Calculate landing glide slope relative to the terrain estimate

name: FLW_TGT_ALT_M
valid_values: 2D Tracking: Maintain constant altitude relative to home and track XY position only
2D + Terrain: Maintain constant altitude relative to terrain below and track XY position
3D Tracking: Track target's altitude (be aware that GPS altitude bias usually makes this useless)

name: GPS_UBX_MODE
valid_values: Heading (Rover With Moving Base UART1 Connected To Autopilot, UART2 Connected To Moving Base)
Moving Base (UART1 Connected To Autopilot, UART2 Connected To Rover)
Heading (Rover With Moving Base UART1 Connected to Autopilot Or Can Node At 921600)
Moving Base (Moving Base UART1 Connected to Autopilot Or Can Node At 921600)
Rover with Static Base on UART2 (similar to Default, except coming in on UART2)

name: CA_FAILURE_MODE
valid_values: Remove first failed motor from effectiveness

name: MAV_PROTO_VER
valid_values: Version 1 with auto-upgrade to v2 if detected

name: MAV_TYPE
valid_values: VTOL Standard (separate fixed rotors for hover and cruise flight)

name: MIS_TKO_LAND_REQ
valid_values: Require a takeoff and a landing
Require both a takeoff and a landing, or neither
Same as previous when landed, in-air require landing only if no valid VTOL approach is present

name: MNT_MODE_IN
valid_values: Auto (RC and MAVLink gimbal protocol v2)

name: RTL_CONE_ANG
valid_values: No cone, always climb to RTL_RETURN_ALT above destination.
Only climb to at least RTL_DESCEND_ALT above destination.

name: RTL_TYPE
valid_values: Return to closest safe point (home or rally point) via direct path.

Return to closest safe point other than home (mission landing pattern or rally point), via direct path. If no mission landing or rally points are defined return home via direct path. Always choose closest safe landing point if vehicle is a VTOL in hover mode.

Return to a planned mission landing, if available, using the mission path while skipping DO_JUMP and other non-position mission items, else return to home via the reverse mission path with the same traversal rules. Do not consider rally points.
Return via direct path to closest destination: home, start of mission landing pattern or safe point. If the destination is a mission landing pattern, follow the pattern to land.

Return to the planned mission landing, or to home via the reverse mission path, whichever is estimated to be closer using mission item indices. Skip DO_JUMP and other non-position mission items while following either mission path. Do not consider rally points.
Return directly to safe landing point (do not consider mission landing and Home)

name: UUV_POS_MODE
valid_values: Moves position setpoint in world frame
Moves position setpoint in body frame
